inventory.name: Rusty Sword
inventory.description: A blade worn by centuries. Still cuts.

inventory.name: Iron Sword
inventory.description: Standard-issue steel. Reliable.

inventory.name: Shadow Dagger
inventory.description: Light and fast. Made for the dark.

inventory.name: Eldrosian Spear
inventory.description: Etched with imperial Eldrosian sigils. Old, but perfectly balanced.

inventory.name: Bone Hatchet
inventory.description: Crudely made from something's femur. Effective at close range.

inventory.name: Serrated Blade
inventory.description: Notched edges designed to tear. Whoever made this was not kind.

inventory.name: Wooden Shield
inventory.description: Splinters, but holds.

inventory.name: Iron Shield
inventory.description: Heavy and dependable.

inventory.name: Leather Armour
inventory.description: Flexible protection.

inventory.name: Scale Armour
inventory.description: Worked from something's hide. Darker than iron, warmer than stone.

inventory.name: Chain Vest
inventory.description: Rings of iron, well-kept despite the age of this place.

inventory.name: Eldrosian Plate
inventory.description: Imperial-issue chest armour. The emblem has been scraped off deliberately.

inventory.name: Health Potion
inventory.description: Restores 15 HP.

inventory.name: Antidote
inventory.description: Cures poison.

inventory.name: Ember Flask
inventory.description: Captured flame. Burns the throat going down. Restores 20 HP.

inventory.name: Bloodmoss Tincture
inventory.description: A dark paste applied to wounds. Restores 10 HP. Tastes like iron.

inventory.name: Clarity Draught
inventory.description: Clears the mind. Removes curses and mental debuffs.

inventory.name: Candle
inventory.description: Flickers in still air. Something about it resists being snuffed.

inventory.name: Relic Coin
inventory.description: Engraved with a face you do not recognise. Inscription: ELDROS PRIMA.

inventory.name: Crystal Mirror
inventory.description: Shows something not quite you. The reflection moves a fraction late.

inventory.name: Old Crown
inventory.description: Heavy. Meant for a larger head. The metal is unlike anything you know.

inventory.name: Void Shard
inventory.description: A sliver of absolute dark. Cold beyond cold. It should not exist.

inventory.name: Starlight Shard
inventory.description: A fragment that holds its own faint glow. Hums very quietly.

inventory.name: Broken Seal
inventory.description: Half of a stone seal. The surviving half shows a serpent eating the sun.

inventory.name: Dragon Scale
inventory.description: Larger than your head. Black as a collapsed star. Warm to the touch.

inventory.name: Blood Amber
inventory.description: A deep red gem, clouded from within. Something moves inside it slowly.

inventory.name: Hollow Stone
inventory.description: A smooth stone with a hole through its centre. Perfectly, impossibly round. Looking through the hole shows a different room than the one you are in.

inventory.name: Dawn Shard
inventory.description: A chip of pale orange stone that produces its own warmth. It smells faintly of something just before sunrise.

inventory.name: Warden's Seal
inventory.description: A flat disc of dark metal bearing an eye above a set of scales. The emblem of an Eldrosian office — you do not know which one.

inventory.name: Ashen Tablet
inventory.description: A flat tablet of pale stone in dense Eldrosian script. One passage is legible.

inventory.name: Charred Ledger
inventory.description: A ledger, burned at the edges. The surviving pages list names — all crossed out with the same black ink.

inventory.name: Rolled Parchment
inventory.description: Rolled tight and sealed with black wax. The wax is already cracked.

inventory.name: Iron Key
inventory.description: Heavy iron. Teeth worn smooth. Opens something down here.

inventory.name: Ashen Key
inventory.description: Forged from compacted ash. Should crumble — does not. Writing on the bow: a word in a language older than Eldros.

inventory.name: Starlight Key
inventory.description: Appears to be made of solidified moonlight. Glows faintly in the dark.

inventory.name: Blood Key
inventory.description: Deep red, almost maroon. Warm to the touch in a way that is not comforting. The teeth are shaped like no lock you have ever seen.
